reasoning: The question requires a newly established protest of 10,000+ participants to start in India between mid-April 2025 (the launch date) and July 1, 2025, and for it to be reported on the Carnegie Global Protest Tracker before July 1. The tracker updates infrequently—as of May 2, 2025, the last update appears to have been in November 2024. The combination of needing a brand-new massive an antigovernment protest in a 2.5-month window AND the tracker happening to publish an update that records it shortly thereafter (before the July 1 deadline) makes this highly improbable. Active protests like the Waqf Amendment Bill demonstrations started prior to the launch date and thus do not qualify into this newly-started parameter. Therefore, the likelihood is very low.
